chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-681 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.3096/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For hearing of CMA No.3097/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of CMA No.3098/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 15-5-2025 Mr. Hamayoun Sheikh, Advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2 to 5. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press the instant petition and submits that he may be allowed to file fresh. In view of above, the instant petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, petitioner is at liberty to file fresh, in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
